## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Attention and GrowthX to discuss SEO content strategy progress and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant increase in impressions (10x) over the last week, but clicks remain low](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Need to optimize SEO titles and meta descriptions to improve click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Content strategy adjustments planned based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Refreshed content (10 articles) uploaded; performance to be monitored](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [10x increase in impressions over the last week](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Low click-through rates despite high impressions](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [34 articles published to date, with 10 more published this week](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [10 articles refreshed with updated content and insights](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### Reasons for Low Click-Through Rates

  - [Mismatched search intent between title and content](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Competition from high domain authority sites (e.g., Salesforce, government websites)](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Zero-click searches due to AI-powered Google Search answers](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Adjust titles and meta descriptions to better match search intent](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Create different angles for highly competitive keywords](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Avoid using specific numbers or years in URLs for evergreen content](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [A/B testing refreshed content to measure performance improvements](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

### Content Lifecycle and Performance Expectations

  - [Articles typically take 2-3 months to fully flourish in search results](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Initial weeks focus on data collection and understanding what content performs well](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Expect significant growth in clicks and impressions around weeks 8-10](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Long-term strategy can lead to hundreds of thousands in weekly/monthly traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

### Next Steps for Improvement

  - [Andrej to send 40 new topic ideas for review by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Team to provide feedback on proposed topics and content angles](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Optimize metadata for high-impression articles to improve click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Scale content production to make up for initial slow growth period](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to send 40 new topic ideas for review (by tomorrow)](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Stewart and team to review and provide feedback on proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [GrowthX to optimize metadata for high-impression articles](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Implement content strategy adjustments based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/zQ4z2h1K7VTby5Nv7oRnDtN7QXzwHTSH?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
